title: Child and family social worker knowledge and skills
body: "This review summarises evidence from a rapid literature review of the post-qualifying knowledge and skills required by child and family social workers.  It was commissioned to support development of the new post qualifying standards, as part of the social work induction programme.  The review identifies:   the knowledge that early career social workers need to work effectively with children and families the post-qualifying skills that social workers need to develop additional, specialist knowledge and skills required to work with specific groups of children and young people the knowledge and skills required by social workers to promote and protect their own wellbeing  "
